name: Daily Digest
description: Daily morning email summary of yesterday's workspace activity, sent to the owner at a scheduled time.

args.subject: Your morning check-in from {{orgName}}
args.body:
Good morning {{firstName}},

Just a gentle heads-up on how things looked at {{orgName}} yesterday. A few new faces reached out, and the chairs stayed nicely booked — nothing that needs your attention before coffee, promise.

If anything needs a closer look, it'll be waiting in your dashboard. Otherwise, have a calm start to the day.

Warmly,
Bright Smile Dental
